zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie於1381年出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾易阿格萊善姆時，他的父親Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan19歲，母親Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald18歲。他和Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他於1485年被列為master of the king's household。他去世於1470年7月15日在蘇格蘭艾斯爾艾格林頓 卡素享年89歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾文寧。

nameMeanings.name: Montgomery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Sainte-Foy-de-Montgomery and Saint-Germain-de-Montgomery (Calvados). In Ireland this surname was present in the medieval period, died out, and was then reintroduced from Scotland in the 17th century. It has been Gaelicized in Ireland as Mac Iomaire and in Scotland as Mac Gumaraid.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie was born in 1381, in Eaglesham, Renfrewshire, Scotland, his father, Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan, was 19 and his mother, Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald, was 18. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie. In 1485, his occupation is listed as master of the king's household. He died on 15 July 1470, in Eglinton Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 89, and was buried in Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie est né en 1381, à Eaglesham, Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie. En 1485, sa profession de son indiquée est master of the king's household. Il est décédé le 15 juillet 1470, à Eglinton Castle, Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterré à Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie 1381 in Eaglesham, Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan 19 und seine Mutter Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald 18. Er hatte mit Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1485 ist sein Beruf als master of the king's household aufgeführt. Er starb am 15. Juli 1470 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Eglinton Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland und wurde in Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie è nato il nel 1381 nel Eaglesham, Renfrewshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie. Nel 1485, la sua occupazione è indicata come master of the king's household. Morì il 15 luglio 1470, nel Eglinton Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland, all'età di 89 anni, e fu sepolto a Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerieが1381年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアエアグレシャムで生まれた時，父Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossanは19歳，母Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonaldは18歳であった。彼はLady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerieとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。1485年，職業はmaster of the king's householdと記録されている。彼は1470年7月15日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアエグリントン カストルで89歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアキルウィニングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie(이)가 1381년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 이글레샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1485년, 그의 직업은 master of the king's household이었다. 그는 1470년 7월 15일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 그린턴 카스틀에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬윈잉에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie nasceu em 1381, em Eaglesham, Renfrewshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie. Em 1485, sua profissão aparece como master of the king's household. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie родился в 1381 г. в местности эаглешам, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald, 18. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie. В 1485 году он работал по профессии master of the king's household. Он умер 15 июля 1470 г. в местности эглинтон кастл, аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 89 лет и был похоронен в местности килвиннинг, аиршир, Шотландия.

Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie. En 1485, su ocupación registrada era master of the king's household. Murió el 15 de julio de 1470, en Eglinton Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland, a la edad de 89 años, y fue sepultado en Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland.
